name: PhClintProject
description: A ph-clint implementation project specification. Drives code generation of a ph-clint CLI project: identity fields (name, scope, version, description, bin) plus three feature toggles (Powerhouse, Mastra, Routine). Enabling Powerhouse is irreversible; enabling Mastra auto-enables Routine; disabling Routine is blocked while Mastra is on.

modules.name: identity
modules.description: Package identity fields: name, scope, version, description, bin

operations.name: SET_DESCRIPTION
operations.description: Set the package description.
operations.template: Set the package description.
operations.reducer: state.description = action.input.description;

operations.name: SET_VERSION
operations.description: Set the package version. Must be a valid semver string.
operations.template: Set the package version. Must be a valid semver string.

errors.name: InvalidVersionError
errors.description: The version must be a valid semver string (major.minor.patch, optionally with prerelease/build metadata).

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_IDENTIFIER
operations.description: Set the package identifier. Parses scope and name from a string like '@scope/name-cli' or just 'name-cli'. Auto-adds '-cli' suffix if missing, stores scope with '@' prefix.
operations.template: Set the package identifier. Parses scope and name from a string like '@scope/name-cli' or just 'name-cli'.

errors.name: InvalidPackageIdentifierError
errors.description: The package identifier is invalid. Must be a valid npm package name with optional scope.

modules.name: features_powerhouse
modules.description: Powerhouse integration level. Ordered enum: Disabled < Reactor < Switchboard < Connect. Once above Disabled, cannot go back to Disabled (irreversible migration).

operations.name: SET_POWERHOUSE_LEVEL
operations.description: Set the Powerhouse integration level. Ordered: Disabled < Reactor < Switchboard < Connect. Lowering below Reactor once above Disabled is not allowed (irreversible migration).
operations.template: Set the Powerhouse integration level. Ordered: Disabled < Reactor < Switchboard < Connect. Lowering below Reactor once above Disabled is not allowed (irreversible migration).

errors.name: CannotLowerPowerhouseError
errors.description: Cannot lower the Powerhouse level below Reactor once it has been set above Disabled.
errors.template: Cannot lower Powerhouse level below Reactor once enabled

operations.name: ENABLE_ROUTINE
operations.description: Enable the routine loop. Idempotent.
operations.template: Enable the routine loop. Idempotent.
operations.reducer: state.features.routine.enabled = true;

operations.name: DISABLE_ROUTINE
operations.description: Disable the routine loop. Always allowed.
operations.template: Disable the routine loop.
operations.reducer: state.features.routine.enabled = false;

modules.name: powerhouse_packages
modules.description: Manage reactor packages and their document types. The app package is auto-created when Powerhouse level goes above Disabled.

operations.name: ADD_POWERHOUSE_PACKAGE
operations.description: Add an external reactor package. The app package is auto-managed by SET_POWERHOUSE_LEVEL.
operations.template: Add an external reactor package. The app package is auto-managed by SET_POWERHOUSE_LEVEL.

errors.name: DuplicatePackageError
errors.description: A package with the same ID or name already exists.

operations.name: REMOVE_POWERHOUSE_PACKAGE
operations.description: Remove a reactor package. Cannot remove the auto-managed app package.
operations.template: Remove a reactor package. Cannot remove the auto-managed app package.

errors.name: PackageNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified package ID was not found.

errors.name: CannotRemoveAppPackageError
errors.description: The auto-managed app package cannot be removed.

errors.name: CannotRemoveManagedPackageError
errors.description: Cannot remove a managed (framework-controlled) package

operations.name: ADD_PACKAGE_DOCUMENT_TYPE
operations.description: Add a document type ID to a package (app or external).
operations.template: Add a document type ID to a package (app or external).

errors.name: InvalidDocumentTypeError
errors.description: Document type must match org/name format (e.g. powerhouse/ph-clint-project).

errors.name: PackageNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified package ID was not found.

errors.name: DuplicateDocumentTypeError
errors.description: This document type is already registered in the package.

operations.name: REMOVE_PACKAGE_DOCUMENT_TYPE
operations.description: Remove a document type ID from a package.
operations.template: Remove a document type ID from a package.

errors.name: PackageNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified package ID was not found.

errors.name: DocumentTypeNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified document type was not found in this package.

operations.name: SET_PACKAGE_VERSION

errors.name: PackageNotFoundError
errors.description: Referenced package does not exist

errors.name: InvalidVersionError
errors.description: Version string is not valid semver

modules.name: external_skills
modules.description: External skills from the skills.sh ecosystem. Each skill has a name and GitHub URL for installation.

operations.name: ADD_EXTERNAL_SKILL
operations.description: Add an external skill. Name must be lowercase kebab-case.
operations.template: Add an external skill. Name must be lowercase kebab-case.

errors.name: InvalidSkillNameError
errors.description: Skill name must be lowercase kebab-case (e.g. playwright-cli).

errors.name: DuplicateSkillError
errors.description: A skill with the same ID or name already exists.

operations.name: REMOVE_EXTERNAL_SKILL
operations.description: Remove an external skill by ID.
operations.template: Remove an external skill by ID.

errors.name: SkillNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified skill ID was not found.

operations.name: SET_EXTERNAL_SKILL_NAME
operations.description: Update the name of an external skill.
operations.template: Update the name of an external skill.

errors.name: SkillNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified skill ID was not found.

errors.name: InvalidSkillNameError
errors.description: Skill name must be lowercase kebab-case.

errors.name: DuplicateSkillError
errors.description: Another skill already uses this name.

operations.name: SET_EXTERNAL_SKILL_GITHUB_URL
operations.description: Update the GitHub URL of an external skill.
operations.template: Update the GitHub URL of an external skill.

errors.name: SkillNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified skill ID was not found.

modules.name: publishing
modules.description: Version bumping and publish records. Tracks dev/staging/production publish intents and their status.

operations.name: BUMP_VERSION
operations.description: Bump the project version. Must be a valid semver string greater than the current version.
operations.template: Bump the project version. Must be a valid semver string greater than the current version.

errors.name: InvalidVersionError
errors.description: The version must be a valid semver string.

operations.name: PUBLISH_DEV
operations.description: Record a dev publish intent. Creates a Pending publish record.
operations.template: Record a dev publish intent. Creates a Pending publish record.

operations.name: PUBLISH_STAGING
operations.description: Record a staging publish intent. Creates a Pending publish record.
operations.template: Record a staging publish intent. Creates a Pending publish record.

operations.name: PUBLISH_PRODUCTION
operations.description: Record a production publish intent. Creates a Pending publish record.
operations.template: Record a production publish intent. Creates a Pending publish record.

operations.name: SET_PUBLISH_STATUS
operations.description: Update the status of a publish record. Used by the trigger after publish completes.
operations.template: Update the status of a publish record. Used by the trigger after publish completes.

errors.name: PublishRecordNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified publish record ID was not found.

modules.name: lifecycle
modules.description: Document lifecycle operations. IMPORT_SPEC bulk-imports a full project spec into the document.

operations.name: IMPORT_SPEC
operations.description: Bulk-import a full project spec into the document. Sets all identity fields, features, packages, and skills. Used by the multi-project boot sync.
operations.schema:
input ImportSpecInput {
  name: String!
  scope: String
  version: String!
  description: String!
  powerhouse: PowerhouseLevel!
  mastraEnabled: Boolean!
  routineEnabled: Boolean!
  packages: [ImportPackageInput!]!
  externalSkills: [ImportSkillInput!]!
  mainAgent: ImportMainAgentInput
  subAgents: [ImportSubAgentInput!]!
  models: [ImportModelInput!]!
  profiles: [ImportProfileInput!]!
  enableChat: Boolean
  proxyEnabled: Boolean
  observabilityEnabled: Boolean
  supportedResources: [String!]
}

input ImportPackageInput {
  id: OID!
  packageName: String!
  documentTypes: [String!]!
  version: String
}

input ImportSkillInput {
  id: OID!
  name: String!
  githubUrl: URL!
}

input ImportModelInput {
  id: OID!
  isDefault: Boolean!
}

input ImportProfileInput {
  id: OID!
  title: String!
  content: String!
}

input ImportMainAgentInput {
  id: OID!
  name: String!
  description: String
  image: String
  modelId: OID!
  profileIds: [OID!]!
  skills: [String!]!
  toolPatterns: [String!]!
}

input ImportSubAgentInput {
  id: OID!
  name: String!
  description: String!
  modelId: OID!
  profileIds: [OID!]!
  skills: [String!]!
  toolPatterns: [String!]!
}
operations.template: Bulk-import a full project spec into the document. Sets all identity fields, features, packages, and skills. Used by the multi-project boot sync.

errors.name: InvalidAgentImageError
errors.description: Agent image must be a data URL

modules.name: deployment
modules.description: Deployment settings: service announcement toggle and supported resource tiers.

operations.name: ADD_SUPPORTED_RESOURCE
operations.description: Add a supported resource tier. Guards against duplicates.
operations.template: Add a supported resource tier. Guards against duplicates.

errors.name: DuplicateResourceError
errors.description: This resource is already in the supported resources list.

operations.name: REMOVE_SUPPORTED_RESOURCE
operations.description: Remove a supported resource tier.
operations.template: Remove a supported resource tier.

errors.name: ResourceNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified resource was not found in the supported resources list.

operations.name: SET_PROXY_ENABLED
operations.description: Toggle the embedded reverse proxy.
operations.template: Toggle the embedded reverse proxy.
operations.reducer: state.deployment.proxyEnabled = action.input.enabled;

operations.name: SET_OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED
operations.description: Toggle the observability plugin (Sentry + OpenTelemetry).
operations.template: Toggle the observability plugin (Sentry + OpenTelemetry).
operations.reducer: state.deployment.observabilityEnabled = action.input.enabled;

modules.name: features_mastra
modules.description: Top-level Mastra feature toggles: enable/disable and chat integration.

operations.name: ENABLE_MASTRA
operations.description: Enable Mastra. Seeds mainAgent with a default model (clint/demo-agent) and a base profile. Idempotent.
operations.template: Enable the Mastra agent feature. Seeds mainAgent with the seeded model + profile.

errors.name: InvalidAgentIdError
errors.description: The agent ID must match /^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$/ — lowercase kebab-case.

errors.name: InvalidAgentNameError
errors.description: The agent name must not be empty after trimming.

operations.name: DISABLE_MASTRA
operations.description: Disable Mastra. Clears mainAgent, subAgents, models, profiles and the chat integration. Removes the auto-managed clint-common package.
operations.template: Disable the Mastra agent feature.

operations.name: SET_ENABLE_CHAT
operations.description: Enable or disable the chat integration. When enabled, auto-adds @powerhousedao/clint-common as a managed package with powerhouse/chat-session doc type. When disabled, removes it if it only has that doc type.
operations.template: Toggle the chat integration feature. Requires both Mastra and Powerhouse to be enabled.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before toggling chat.

errors.name: PowerhouseNotEnabledError
errors.description: Powerhouse must be enabled (Reactor or above) before toggling chat.

modules.name: mastra_models
modules.description: Model library CRUD. Models are referenced by main and sub agents via modelId.

operations.name: ADD_MODEL
operations.description: Add a model to the library. ID must be provider/model-name format. First model is forced default. If isDefault is true, previous default is unset.
operations.template: Add a model to the library.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing models.

errors.name: InvalidModelIdError
errors.description: Model ID must match provider/model-name format.

errors.name: DuplicateModelError
errors.description: A model with this ID already exists.

operations.name: REMOVE_MODEL
operations.description: Remove a model from the library. Rejects when any agent (main or sub) references it. Promotes first remaining to default if removing the current default.
operations.template: Remove a model from the library.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing models.

errors.name: ModelNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified model was not found.

errors.name: ModelInUseError
errors.description: Cannot remove a model that is still referenced by an agent.

operations.name: SET_DEFAULT_MODEL
operations.description: Set a model as the default. Unsets the previous default.
operations.template: Set a model as the default.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing models.

errors.name: ModelNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified model was not found.

modules.name: mastra_profiles
modules.description: Profile library CRUD. Profiles are referenced by main and sub agents via profileIds.

operations.name: ADD_PROFILE
operations.description: Add a profile to the library. Inserted before insertBefore if provided, otherwise appended.
operations.template: Add a profile to the library.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing profiles.

errors.name: InvalidProfileIdError
errors.description: Profile ID must match /^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$/ — lowercase kebab-case.

errors.name: DuplicateProfileError
errors.description: A profile with this ID already exists.

errors.name: ProfileNotFoundError
errors.description: The insertBefore profile was not found.

operations.name: UPDATE_PROFILE
operations.description: Update an existing profile's title and/or content. Only updates provided fields.
operations.template: Update an existing profile.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing profiles.

errors.name: ProfileNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified profile was not found.

operations.name: REMOVE_PROFILE
operations.description: Remove a profile from the library. Rejects when any agent (main or sub) references it.
operations.template: Remove a profile from the library.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing profiles.

errors.name: ProfileNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified profile was not found.

errors.name: ProfileInUseError
errors.description: Cannot remove a profile that is still referenced by an agent.

operations.name: REORDER_PROFILES
operations.description: Move one or more profiles before another profile, or to the end if insertBefore is null.
operations.template: Reorder profiles.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing profiles.

errors.name: ProfileNotFoundError
errors.description: A referenced profile was not found.

modules.name: mastra_main_agent
modules.description: Main agent identity ops. Main agent ID is set at ENABLE_MASTRA and stable thereafter — to change it, disable then re-enable.

operations.name: SET_MAIN_AGENT_NAME
operations.description: Set the main agent's display name. Must be non-empty after trim.
operations.template: Set the main agent's display name.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing the main agent.

errors.name: InvalidAgentNameError
errors.description: The agent name must not be empty after trimming.

operations.name: SET_MAIN_AGENT_DESCRIPTION
operations.description: Set the main agent's description.
operations.template: Set the main agent's description.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing the main agent.

operations.name: CLEAR_MAIN_AGENT_DESCRIPTION
operations.description: Clear the main agent's description.
operations.template: Clear the main agent's description.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing the main agent.

operations.name: SET_MAIN_AGENT_IMAGE

operations.description: Clear the main agent's avatar.
operations.template: Clear the main agent's avatar.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing the main agent.

modules.name: mastra_sub_agents
modules.description: Sub-agent CRUD. Sub-agent ids are unique across the main agent and all other sub-agents.

operations.name: ADD_SUB_AGENT
operations.description: Add a sub-agent. ID must be lowercase kebab-case and unique (across main + sub agents). modelId must exist in the model library. Seeds empty profileIds/skills/toolPatterns.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing sub-agents.

errors.name: InvalidAgentIdError
errors.description: Sub-agent ID must be lowercase kebab-case.

errors.name: InvalidAgentNameError
errors.description: Sub-agent name must not be empty after trimming.

errors.name: DuplicateAgentIdError

errors.name: ModelReferenceNotFoundError
errors.description: The referenced modelId does not exist in the model library.

operations.name: REMOVE_SUB_AGENT
operations.description: Remove a sub-agent.
operations.template: Remove a sub-agent.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing sub-agents.

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError

operations.name: SET_SUB_AGENT_NAME
operations.description: Set a sub-agent's display name.
operations.template: Set a sub-agent's display name.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing sub-agents.

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified sub-agent was not found.

errors.name: InvalidAgentNameError
errors.description: Sub-agent name must not be empty after trimming.

operations.name: SET_SUB_AGENT_DESCRIPTION
operations.description: Set a sub-agent's description.
operations.template: Set a sub-agent's description.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing sub-agents.

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified sub-agent was not found.

modules.name: mastra_agent_bindings
modules.description: Per-agent assignments of model, profile references, skills, and tool-name patterns. agentId resolves to main if it matches mainAgent.id, else looks up subAgents.

operations.name: SET_AGENT_MODEL
operations.description: Set the agent's model. modelId must exist in the model library. agentId resolves to main or a sub.
operations.template: Bind an agent to a model.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled before managing agent bindings.

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified agentId resolves to neither main nor any sub-agent.

errors.name: ModelReferenceNotFoundError
errors.description: The referenced modelId does not exist in the model library.

operations.name: ADD_AGENT_PROFILE_REF
operations.description: Add a profile reference to an agent. profileId must exist in the profile library. Inserts before insertBefore if provided, otherwise appends. Dedup: silent if already present.
operations.template: Add a profile reference to an agent.

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError
errors.description: Mastra must be enabled.

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError
errors.description: The specified agentId was not found.

errors.name: ProfileReferenceNotFoundError

operations.name: REMOVE_AGENT_PROFILE_REF

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError

errors.name: ProfileReferenceNotFoundError

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError

errors.name: MastraNotEnabledError

errors.name: AgentNotFoundError

operations.description: Add a tool-name glob pattern to an agent. Dedup: silent if already present.

operations.description: Remove a tool-name glob pattern from an agent.
